controlsConfirmed.evidence: RealtimeEvent carries user_id separately from the serialized SSE data, so filtering does not expose user ids in the client protocol.
realtime() authenticates the bearer token to an AuthDevice and only emits events where event.user_id == auth.user_id.

summary: Security review pass: authenticated realtime streams no longer receive broadcast events for other SaaS users, and SSE payload shape remains non-secret.
